headline: CME Group Weighs Oil Intervention Risk As Energy Volumes Hit Records
summary: CME Group’s CEO has warned that potential government intervention in oil derivatives during the US–Iran conflict could disrupt market stability. The comments come as energy trading on CME platforms reaches all time highs, reflecting intense geopolitical uncertainty. The situation highlights both CME’s central role in risk management and the sensitivity of derivatives markets to policy actions. For investors looking at NasdaqGS:CME, this news goes to the heart of what the company does as a...

headline: Scottie Pippen helps sell Wall Street on prediction markets
summary: The nascent industry has both captivated and unnerved Wall Street by offering financial contracts that make it possible to bet on everything from the Super Bowl to geopolitical flashpoints like Iran.

headline: Kalshi co-founder Luana Lopes Lara on the biggest prediction markets risks she has ever taken
summary: Luana Lopes Lara, co-founder of prediction markets startup Kalshi, tells CNBC about the biggest bets she ever made on the way to billionaire status.
